properties.documentation: Detailed UML handoff package for the ArchiMate run-signup service realization.
Runs the signup policy: raider lookup, character ownership, close-time, guild/rank/roster gates, upsert, and optimistic concurrency retry.
Loads and filters account-owned characters to the run guild roster before the signup form is submitted.
Sanitized participant shape: omits raiderBattleNetId, internal entry id, level, and race fields.

uml.documentation: Discriminated result translated by Function adapters into success or problem+json responses.
